sample.Description: Event onset in number of sample

stim_file.Description: File of image presented. For button pressing events no info is provided (designated by [])

trial_type.Description: Comprenhesive information of stimulus and responses corresponding to each event

Levels.famous_second_early: Immediate repeated  presentation of famous face
Levels.famous_second_late: Delayed repeated  presentation of famous face
Levels.scrambled_second_early: Immediate repeated  presentation of scrambled face
Levels.scrambled_second_late: Delayed repeated  presentation of scrambled face
Levels.unfamiliar_second_early: Immediate repeated  presentation of unfamiliar face
Levels.unfamiliar_second_late: Delayed repeated  presentation of unfamiliar face
Levels.right_nonsym: Right button press to indicated less symmetric face
Levels.left_sym: Left button press to indicated more symmetric face
Levels.left_nonsym: Left button press to indicated less symmetric face
Levels.right_sym: Right button press to indicated more symmetric face
Levels.boundary: The boundary mark of each run as the run data was merged

HED.boundary: Description/The boundary mark of each run as the run data was merged

event_type.Description: Represent the two more general types events in the experiment

Levels.button_press: Button pressing indicating level of symmetry of face presented

Levels.6: Immediate repeated  presentation of famous face
Levels.7: Delayed repeated  presentation of famous face
Levels.14: Immediate repeated  presentation of unfamiliar face
Levels.15: Delayed repeated  presentation of unfamiliar face
Levels.18: Immediate repeated  presentation of scrambled face
Levels.19: Delayed repeated  presentation of scrambled face

event_order.Description: Each image is presented twice. This index represent the order of presentation of each image

Levels.0: Not an image. This may be a button press or a boundary

trial_dist.Description: Distance in trial units since the previous presentation of the same image

time_dist.Description: Time since the previous presentation of the same image

hed_def_sensory.Description: Metadata dictionary for gathering sensory definitions

HED.face_image_def: (Definition/Face-image, (Visual-presentation, (Foreground-view, ((Image, Face, Hair), Color/Grayscale), ((White, Cross), (Center-of, Computer-screen))), (Background-view, Black), Description/A happy or neutral face in frontal or three-quarters frontal pose with long hair cropped presented as an achromatic foreground image on a black background with a white fixation cross superposed.))

hed_def_actions.Description: Metadata dictionary for gathering participant action definitions

HED.press_left_finger_def: (Definition/Press-left-finger, ((Index-finger, (Left-side-of, Experiment-participant)), (Press, Keyboard-key), Description/The participant presses a key with the left index finger to indicate a face symmetry judgment.))
HED.press_right_finger_def: (Definition/Press-right-finger, ((Index-finger, (Right-side-of, Experiment-participant)), (Press, Keyboard-key), Description/The participant presses a key with the right index finger to indicate a face symmetry evaluation.))

hed_def_conds.Description: Metadata dictionary for gathering experimental condition definitions

HED.famous_face_cond_def: (Definition/Famous-face-cond, ((Image, Face, Famous), Description/A face that should be recognized by the participants))
HED.unfamiliar_face_cond_def: (Definition/Unfamiliar-face-cond, ((Image, Face, Unfamiliar), Description/A face that should not be recognized by the participants.))
HED.scrambled_face_cond_def: (Definition/Scrambled-face-cond, ((Image, Face, Disordered), Description/A scrambled face image generated by taking face 2D FFT.))
HED.first_show_cond_def: (Definition/First-show-cond, ((Item-count/1, Face, Item-interval/0), Description/Factor level indicating the first display of this face.))
HED.immediate_repeat_cond_def: (Definition/Immediate-repeat-cond, ((Item-count/2, Face, Item-interval/1), Description/Factor level indicating this face was the same as previous one.))
HED.delayed_repeat_cond_def: (Definition/Delayed-repeat-cond, ((Item-count/2, Face, (Item-interval, (Greater-than-or-equal-to, Item-interval/5))), Description/Factor level indicating face was seen 5 to 15 trials ago.))
HED.left_sym_cond_def: (Definition/Left-sym-cond, (Condition-variable/Key-assignment, ((Index-finger, (Left-side-of, Experiment-participant)), (Behavioral-evidence, Symmetrical)), ((Index-finger, (Right-side-of, Experiment-participant)), (Behavioral-evidence, Asymmetrical)), Description/Left index finger key press indicates a face with above average symmetry.))
HED.right_sym_cond_def: (Definition/Right-sym-cond, (Condition-variable/Key-assignment, ((Index-finger, (Right-side-of, Experiment-participant)), (Behavioral-evidence, Symmetrical)), ((Index-finger, (Left-side-of, Experiment-participant)), (Behavioral-evidence, Asymmetrical)), Description/Right index finger key press indicates a face with above average symmetry.))
